# Project Revenue

Initially, Monkey Finance's revenue comes from two sources:

* **pump.fun fees** — 100% of the trading fees generated by MONKEY's pump.fun listing go to the project.
* **Wrap/unwrap fees** — the protocol split described in [Fees & Where They Go](fees.md) (currently 10% of every wrap and unwrap fee) is routed to the project's protocol wallet.

Because these two sources come from different places, revenue may end up collected in different currencies rather than a single one — e.g. SOL from pump.fun fees, TKN from wrap/unwrap fees — rather than everything landing in one token.

### Future revenue

As the project develops, additional revenue sources are expected to appear alongside these two. This page will be updated as they're introduced.
